false_positive_snippets.description: Using xml.etree.ElementTree to parse untrusted XML data is known to be vulnerable to XML attacks. Replace xml.etree.ElementTree with the equivalent defusedxml package, or make sure defusedxml.defuse_stdlib() is called.
false_positive_snippets.tool_snippet:
1 import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
2 from http.server import BaseHTTPRequestHandler, HTTPServer
3 from urllib.parse import urlparse
false_positive_snippets.context:
>>   1: import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
